controls.label: Does your business have a Verification Standards — Documents process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Verification Standards — Documents process in place. You must establish a documented Verification Standards — Documents process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program provide for the verification of KYC information about individuals using reliable and independent documentation?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not establish a documented framework for verifying individual KYC information using reliable and independent documents. Implement and document a verification approach that addresses the requirements in rules 4.9.2 and 4.9.3 before proceeding.

controls.label: Does your process require verification that documents used to establish KYC information have not expired (except for Commonwealth passports expired within the preceding two years)?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not include mandatory checks to confirm that KYC verification documents have not expired. Update your procedure to verify document expiry dates for all documents used to verify individual identity and information, as required under rule 4.9.2.

controls.label: Have you documented which reliable and independent documents your organisation will require to verify an individual's name, date of birth, and/or residential address?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not specify which reliable and independent documents will be used to verify individual names, dates of birth, and residential addresses. Document the acceptable sources of verification for each of these core KYC data points, as required under rule 4.9.3(1).

controls.label: If your organisation verifies additional KYC information beyond name, date of birth and residential address for individuals, have you documented which reliable and independent documents may be used to verify that information?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not specify acceptable documentation for any additional individual KYC information collected beyond the core data elements. Document which reliable and independent documents may be used to verify any additional KYC information collected, as required under rule 4.9.3(2).

controls.label: Have you established risk-based rules defining whether, and in what circumstances, your organisation will rely upon copies of reliable and independent documents?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not define when copies of documents may be accepted versus when originals are required. Establish risk-based criteria for accepting document copies and document those decisions in your policy, as required under rule 4.9.3(3).

controls.label: Have you documented when and how your organisation will check whether documents produced about an individual may have been forged, tampered with, cancelled or stolen?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not include procedures for detecting forged, tampered, cancelled or stolen documents. Document the circumstances under which such checks will be performed and the specific steps your organisation will take to verify document authenticity, as required under rule 4.9.3(4).

controls.label: Have you determined whether your organisation will use any available authentication services to verify documents used for KYC verification of individuals?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not address the use of available authentication services for verifying individual KYC documents. Evaluate and document whether your organisation will use authentication services for document verification, as required under rule 4.9.3(5).

controls.label: Have you established procedures for independently initiating contact with an individual to confirm their KYC information, and documented the circumstances under which this will occur?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not include procedures for independent contact verification. Document whether and how your organisation will independently contact individuals to confirm their KYC information, as required under rule 4.9.3(6).

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program provide for the verification of KYC information about customers who are not individuals using reliable and independent documentation?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not establish a documented framework for verifying KYC information about non-individual customers using reliable and independent documents. Implement and document a verification approach for non-individuals that addresses the requirements in rule 4.9.5 before proceeding.

controls.label: Have you documented what reliable and independent documents and how many of them your organisation will use to verify KYC information about non-individual customers?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not specify the number and type of reliable and independent documents required to verify non-individual customer KYC information. Document the specific documents and quantity requirements for verifying corporate or other non-individual customers, as required under rule 4.9.5(1).

controls.label: Have you established risk-based criteria to determine whether a document is sufficiently contemporaneous for verification of non-individual customers?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not define what constitutes a sufficiently current or 'contemporaneous' document for non-individual verification. Establish and document risk-based criteria for determining document currency for corporate or other non-individual customers, as required under rule 4.9.5(2).

controls.label: Have you established risk-based rules defining whether, and in what circumstances, your organisation will rely upon copies of reliable and independent documents for non-individual customers?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not define when copies of documents may be accepted versus when originals are required for non-individual customers. Establish risk-based criteria for accepting document copies for corporate or other non-individual customers and document those decisions, as required under rule 4.9.5(3).

controls.label: Have you documented when and how your organisation will check whether documents produced about a non-individual customer may have been forged, tampered with, cancelled or stolen?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not include procedures for detecting forged, tampered, cancelled or stolen documents for non-individual customers. Document the circumstances under which such checks will be performed for corporate or other non-individual customers and the steps your organisation will take to verify document authenticity, as required under rule 4.9.5(4).

controls.label: Have you determined whether your organisation will use any available authentication services to verify documents used for KYC verification of non-individual customers?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not address the use of available authentication services for verifying non-individual customer KYC documents. Evaluate and document whether your organisation will use authentication services for non-individual document verification, as required under rule 4.9.5(5).

controls.label: Have you established procedures for independently initiating contact with a non-individual customer to confirm their KYC information, and documented the circumstances under which this will occur?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity process does not include procedures for independent contact verification with non-individual customers. Document whether and how your organisation will independently contact corporate or other non-individual customers to confirm their KYC information, as required under rule 4.9.5(6).

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: Verification Framework for Individuals
groups.description: Establish whether your AML/CTF program includes documented procedures for verifying individual KYC information using reliable and independent documents.

groups.title: Document Expiry and Validity
groups.description: Procedures to verify that documents used for KYC verification have not expired and remain current.

groups.title: Document Selection and Acceptance Criteria
groups.description: Define which reliable and independent documents will be accepted to verify specific KYC information elements.

groups.title: Document Copy and Original Requirements
groups.description: Establish risk-based criteria for when copies may be accepted versus when original documents are required.

groups.title: Document Integrity and Fraud Detection
groups.description: Procedures to detect and verify the authenticity of documents, including checks for forgery, tampering, cancellation or theft.

groups.title: Document Authentication Services
groups.description: Determine whether authentication services (such as issuer verification) will be used to validate documents.

groups.title: Independent Contact Verification
groups.description: Establish procedures for independently verifying KYC information by contacting the individual directly.

groups.title: Verification Framework for Non-Individual Customers
groups.description: Establish whether your AML/CTF program includes documented procedures for verifying KYC information about non-individual customers (companies, trusts, partnerships, etc.) using reliable and independent documents.

groups.title: Non-Individual Document Selection and Quantity
groups.description: Define which reliable and independent documents and how many of them will be required to verify non-individual customer KYC information.

groups.title: Non-Individual Document Currency
groups.description: Establish risk-based criteria for determining whether documents are sufficiently current and relevant for non-individual verification.

groups.title: Non-Individual Document Copy and Original Requirements
groups.description: Establish risk-based criteria for when copies may be accepted versus when original documents are required for non-individual customers.

groups.title: Non-Individual Document Integrity and Fraud Detection
groups.description: Procedures to detect and verify the authenticity of documents used for non-individual customer verification.

groups.title: Non-Individual Document Authentication Services
groups.description: Determine whether authentication services will be used to validate documents for non-individual customers.

groups.title: Non-Individual Independent Contact Verification
groups.description: Establish procedures for independently verifying non-individual customer KYC information by contacting the customer directly.
